_comment: MIGRATION: Replace placeholder values with actual Expandi API credentials.
_warning: NEVER commit this file with real credentials. Use environment variables in production.
api_domain_note: This is the correct domain for Expandi's reversed webhook feature. Do NOT use api.expandi.io — that is the old/incorrect domain.

cold_dtc_savings.name: Cold DTC Savings
cold_dtc_savings.description: Cold outreach to DTC ecommerce brands — LinkedIn connection requests with 10-word casual messages
cold_dtc_savings.webhook_url_note: Set via EXPANDI_CAMPAIGN_A_WEBHOOK environment variable. Format: https://api.liaufa.com/webhooks/reversed/{account_id}/{campaign_id}

3pl_focused.name: 3PL Focused
3pl_focused.description: Outreach targeting 3PL and fulfillment companies — LinkedIn connection requests emphasizing partnership opportunities
3pl_focused.webhook_url_note: Set via EXPANDI_CAMPAIGN_B_WEBHOOK environment variable. Format: https://api.liaufa.com/webhooks/reversed/{account_id}/{campaign_id}

rate_limits.note: These are Expandi defaults for a warmed LinkedIn account. Adjust in Expandi dashboard, not here.
